name: bandit.extortion_first_demand_pay_success_save_mcw
description: Bandit shakedown/toll-control regression: choose Pay from first demand, complete a real NPC trade payment, request save, and prove the paid shakedown writeback persisted to saved bandit metadata.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for the McWilliams bandit local-contact fixture before toll-control proof begins; this is startup/load footing only

steps.label: advance_299_turns_to_gate_edge
steps.expected_immediate_state: bounded turn advance reaches the shakedown gate edge; proof is deferred to the same-run demand-surface artifact after the final turn

steps.label: advance_final_turn_to_first_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: Bandit shakedown dialogue window is visible with the basecamp-pressure opening and player-facing Pay/Fight choices after the final local-contact turn

steps.label: audit_first_demand_surface_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove the bandit camp-style local gate and pay/fight shakedown surface with reachable goods and demanded toll
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names camp_style profile, open_shakedown posture, reachable goods, demanded toll, visible Pay/Fight responses, and the NPC trade UI payment bridge

steps.label: choose_pay
steps.expected_visible_fact: Pay was selected from the visible bandit shakedown dialogue; the actual NPC trade UI / trade window is now open with Pay: debt before any hidden surrender.
steps.abort_reason: selecting Pay did not visibly open the NPC trade UI with auto-balance controls

steps.label: audit_trade_ui_opened_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove choosing Pay opened the actual NPC trade API / trade window over the whole honest basecamp-side pool before goods were surrendered
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log names the actual NPC trade API, Pay: debt title, demanded/reachable values, and the honest pool components: player carried, nearby NPC/faction, and scene/basecamp goods

steps.label: switch_to_you_pane_and_open_trade_filter
steps.expected_immediate_state: switch to player-side trade pane and open the inventory filter; proof is the following filtered Hub row OCR

steps.label: filter_hub_items
steps.expected_visible_fact: Trade UI player-side filter is narrowed to Hub items so the payment macro can select a high-value stack from the honest reachable pool.
steps.abort_reason: filtered player-side trade pane did not show the high-value Hub helmet stack

steps.label: autobalance_hub_helmets
steps.expected_visible_fact: F1 autobalance selected the filtered Hub helmet stack into the player offer, enough to cover the demanded shakedown debt.
steps.expected_immediate_state: F1 autobalance applies to the filtered Hub item offer; proof is deferred to the following case-sensitive acceptance prompt and paid trade artifact.

steps.label: confirm_trade_offer
steps.expected_visible_fact: Balanced shakedown payment offer opened the case-sensitive trade acceptance prompt.
steps.abort_reason: balanced trade did not show the case-sensitive acceptance prompt

steps.label: accept_trade_confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: confirmed the proven case-sensitive trade prompt; paid outcome proof is deferred to the same-run log and saved-state gates

steps.label: audit_payment_writeback_artifact
steps.abort_reason: same-run debug artifact did not prove paid trade result and paid shakedown outcome
steps.expected_immediate_state: same-run debug log records paid trade result and shakedown paid outcome

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_paid_shakedown_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player mtime baseline recorded after paid shakedown outcome and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_paid_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: save action was requested after paid shakedown; proof is deferred to the saved-player mtime and saved bandit metadata gates because OCR on the small prompt is unreliable

steps.label: confirm_save_after_paid_shakedown
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_paid_shakedown_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after confirmed paid shakedown save
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved-player file mtime changed after the requested baseline before saved-map feature proof may continue
steps.failure_rule: missing player-save mtime progress or unreadable save metadata makes this step red/blocked

steps.label: audit_saved_paid_shakedown_bandit_state
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved bandit_live_world metadata persisted the paid shakedown outcome: no active group/target, no outside active members, and roster back at home
steps.expected_immediate_state: saved bandit_live_world metadata contains the paid outcome state before persistence proof may close
steps.failure_rule: missing required saved bandit_live_world metadata or unreadable dimension data makes this step red/blocked

evidence_contract.claim: choosing Pay opens the actual NPC trade UI, successful item payment records paid shakedown outcome, save writes it to disk, and saved bandit metadata returns the group home
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for successful payment writeback
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No successful-payment writeback credit unless visible Pay UI, filtered honest item selection, paid log artifact, saved-player mtime advance, and saved bandit metadata are all green.
